name: remote-dev-launcher
description: Sync an SSH-remote workspace to your local machine and launch configured dev targets — for Electron and other GUI apps that must run where the display is.

remoteDevLauncher.clonePath.markdownDescription:
Base directory on the **local machine** where remote workspaces are mirrored (cloned). Each project gets its own subfolder, named by the `mirrorName` in its `.devlauncher/config.json`.

Leave empty to use the default `~/.devlauncher-mirrors`. A leading `~` expands to your home directory. Because this is a local filesystem path, it can be set globally in **User** settings or overridden per project in **Workspace** settings.

scripts.package: pnpm run compile && vsce package --no-dependencies -o remote-dev-launcher.vsix
